news.title: RBI "opens the floodgates": Dhawal Dalal on why now may be the best entry point for debt investors in two years
news.description: India is attracting foreign debt capital by removing taxes and easing borrowing rules. This move is expected to inject significant liquidity by September 30. Experts believe this will lower short-term interest rates. Target maturity funds are recommended for investors to benefit from these changes.

news.description: Since hitting a record high of $126,000 last fall, bitcoin has dropped to just above $60,000 amid waves of selling. That has erased more than $1.2 trillion in market cap in eight months and wiped out all gains across President Donald Trump’s second term.
